query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='pending' THEN 1 END) as pending, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='contacted' THEN 1 END) as contacted, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='scheduled' THEN 1 END) as scheduled, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 END) as completed FROM giveawayApplications WHERE isTestEntry=0; SELECT howDidTheyHear, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM giveawayApplications WHERE isTestEntry=0 GROUP BY howDidTheyHear ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
